---
title: "LLM Neuroanatomy: Topping the Leaderboard Without Changing a Weight"
description: "Duplicate a block of middle transformer layers and run them twice at inference. The power of thinking it over twice."
author: "synesis"
date: "2026-03-24"
categories: [AI, LLMs, inference, links]
image: duplicated-layers.png
---

![Diagram from the dnhkng.github.io post showing the duplicated middle-layer block. ([Source](https://dnhkng.github.io/posts/rys/))](duplicated-layers.png){fig-align="center"}

Improve an LLM without training by duplicating a specific block of middle transformer layers and running them twice during inference. The power of thinking it over twice [[1]](#ref-1).

---

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] "LLM Neuroanatomy: How I Topped the LLM Leaderboard Without Changing a Single Weight." *dnhkng.github.io*. <https://dnhkng.github.io/posts/rys/>

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_llm-neuroanatomy-how-i-topped-the-llm-leaderboard-activity-7442232550196117504-bASa).*
